name: gondly
description: Gondly monorepo: PWA mobile-first and NestJS API for grocery lists and collaborative purchases.

scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace @gondly/types && npm run build --workspace @gondly/utils && npm run build --workspace @gondly/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @gondly/types && npm run build --workspace @gondly/utils && npm run build --workspace @gondly/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @gondly/types && npm run build --workspace @gondly/utils && npm run build --workspace @gondly/api && npm run build --workspace @gondly/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @gondly/utils && npm run test --workspace @gondly/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @gondly/utils && npm run typecheck --workspace @gondly/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @gondly/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @gondly/web && npm run lint --workspace @gondly/api
